ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝³ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsSquareIntegrable ι Ω E inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ mΩ X 𝓕 P
i j : ι
hij : i ≤ j
⊢ eLpNorm (X i) 2 P ≤ eLpNorm (X j) 2 P

have h_fin (k : ι) : ∫⁻ ω, ‖X k ω‖₊ ^ (2 : ℝ) ∂P < ∞ := by
    have := (le_iSup (fun k ↦ eLpNorm (X k) 2 P) k).trans_lt hX.bounded
    rwa [eLpNorm_eq_lintegral_norm_pow two_ne_zero two_ne_top, ENNReal.rpow_lt_top_iff] at this
    simp
  simp_rw [eLpNorm_eq_lintegral_norm_pow two_ne_zero two_ne_top, one_div]
  gcongr
  rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_toReal (h_fin i), ← ENNReal.ofReal_toReal (h_fin j)]
  refine ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal ?_
  rw [← integral_eq_lintegral_of_nonneg_ae (ae_of_all _ fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _)
        (hX.integrable_sq i).aestronglyMeasurable,
      ← integral_eq_lintegral_of_nonneg_ae (ae_of_all _ fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _)
        (hX.integrable_sq j).aestronglyMeasurable]
  exact hX.submartingale_sq_norm.integral_le hij

  simp_rw [ENNReal.rpow_two, ENNReal.sq_eq_nnreal_sq, ← ENNReal.coe_pow,
    ← Real.nnnorm_of_nonneg (sq_nonneg _)]
  rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_integral_eq_lintegral_of_real (h_int i) (fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _),
    ← ENNReal.ofReal_integral_eq_lintegral_of_real (h_int j) (fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _)]
  exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hX.submartingale_sq_norm.integral_le hij)

have h := hX.submartingale_sq_norm.integral_le hij
  rw [eLpNorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_enorm two_ne_zero ENNReal.two_ne_top,

  exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal h
